name: Raw Apple Cake > Southern Living
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar and cooking oil.
2. Add eggs and beat well.
3. Combine flour, cinnamon, salt, and soda; gradually add to egg mixture.
4. Add vanilla, coconut, dates, apples, and nuts. The batter will be thick.
5. Pour batter into a greased and floured 10-inch tube pan.
6. Bake at 325 degrees for 1-1/2 to 2 hours or until done.
